global.description: The ad features a light gray background with a prominent discount offer and a call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with discounts and free shipping.

elements.label: Light gray background
elements.description: A light gray rectangular background that fills the top portion of the ad.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'CrispBox' in a bold font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small rectangular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold, bright text, located at the top right.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: An abstract representation of product boxes, with two square shapes and one circular shape, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Discount offer text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Up to 40% off' in a large font, prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Shipping offer text
elements.description: Smaller text below the discount offer stating 'Free shipping over $25' in a clear font.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Learn more' in a bold font, located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Additional product shapes
elements.description: Two small circular shapes positioned below the main product display, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: The main promotional text 'Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25' in a large, bold font at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Learn more text
elements.description: Text on a button that invites users to 'Learn more', positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: The logo of CrispBox, displayed in a bold font at the top left corner.

elements.label: SALE label
elements.description: A bright 'SALE' label in bold text, positioned at the top right corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, clean and modern, CrispBox logo, SALE badge, discount offer text
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the SALE badge at the top right, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CrispBox, SALE, Up to 40% off, Free shipping over $25, Learn more
